titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5961

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=774 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.739167+00 | translation moa=775 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.74891+00

p.cl: . Omnibus hoc scriptum visuris uel Audituris . Willelmus filius Roberti de Scremerstona salutem .

me cum Consenssu Willelmi heredis mei Dedisse . Concesisse . et hac presenti carta
mea confirmasse Deo et sancto Cvhtberto et Domino Ricardo priori et conuentui de Coldingham et eorum succ
essoribus inperpetuum pro quadraginta et septem marcis argenti quas michi pacauerunt pre
manibus Totam terram meam de prendergest’ cum domibus . Tofftis . et Crofftis . et cum omnibus pertin
entiis suis sine aliquo retinemento . videlicet sex bouatas terre cum pertinentiis in territo
rio de Prendergest’ . Illas silicet Duas Bouatas terre cum Tofto et Crofto quas Robertus Wind te
nuit . et Illas Duas bouatas terre quas Willelmus filius Galfridi tenuit . et Illas Duas bouatas terre
quas Galfridus filius Waldeui tenuit . et Tofftum et Croftum que Aldanus filius Waldeui tenuit .
et Tofftum et Crofftum que Ricardus filius Angnetis tenuit . Quas dictas terras cum domibus . tofftis .
et Crofftis cum omnibus suis pertinentiis habui ex dono Roberti fili Roberti de Prendergest in villa
et territorio de Prendergest’ . Habend’ et Tenend’ prefatis priori et Conuentui . de Coldingham et
eorum successoribus de me et heredibus meis inperpetuum adeo libere . quiete . et honorifice in omnibus 
sicut in carta eiusdem Roberti inde conffecta plenius et melius continetur et Testatur . Et ego Wi
llelmus de Scremerstona et heredes mei Totas terras prenominatas cum dictis domibus . Tofftis et Crofftis .
et cum omnibus pertinentiis . suis sepedictis priori et conuentui de Coldingham et eorum successoribus
Contra omnes homines et feminas inperpetuum warantizabimus . adquietabimus . et defendemus .
In cuius Rei Testimonium  huic scripto sigillum meum appossui .

Hiis Testibus  Domino Willelmo
de Lindesey . Domino Willelmo de Mordingtona . Domino Alano de Swintona . Alano filio suo . Thoma
de Nesbyt . Ada filio suo . Ada de Prendergest’ . Roberto filio Gregorii de Coldingham . Dauid de lumes
den . Gilberto de lumesden . Ada filio Iohannis de Eytona . Bertramo de Ristona . Iohanne filio Ingera
mi . Roberto filio Reginaldi . et Aliis .

div.p: To all who shall view or hear this writing, William son of Robert of Scremerston sends greeting. Know me, all of you, by the consent of my heir, William, to have given, granted, and made firm by this my present charter, to God, and to Saint Cuthbert, and to the lord Richard the prior, and to the convent of Coldingham, and their successors for ever, in return for forty-seven merks of silver which they have paid to me as an advance, my whole land of Prenderguest, with dwellings, tofts, and crofts, and with all its pertinents, without any withholding; namely, six oxgangs of land with pertinents in the territory of Prenderguest; that is, the two oxgangs with toft and croft which Robert Wind held; and the two oxgangs of land which William son of Geoffrey held; and the two oxgangs of land which Geoffrey son of Waldef held; and the toft and croft which Haldan son of Waldef held; and the toft and croft which Richard son of Agnes held. These said lands with dwellings, tofts, and crofts, with all their pertinents, I had out of the gift of Robert son of Robert of Prenderguest in the toun and territory of Prenderguest. For the aforementioned prior and convent of Coldingham and their successors to have and to hold of me and my heirs for ever, as freely, quitely, and honourably in all things, as it is the more fully and better set out and witnessed in the charter of the same Robert drawn up thereupon. And I, William of Scremerston, and my heirs shall warrant, acquit, and defend all the lands aforenamed, with dwellings, tofts and crofts, and with all their pertinents, to the oft-mentioned prior and convent of Coldingham and their successors, against all men and women for ever. In testimony of this matter, I have applied my seal to this writing. With these witnesses: the lord William of Lindsay; the lord William of Mordington; the lord Alan of Swinton; Alan his son; Thomas of Nisbet; Adam his son; Ada of Prenderguest; Robert son of Gregory of Coldingham; David of Lumsdaine; Gilbert of Lumsdaine; Adam son of John of Ayton; Bertram of Reston; John son of Ingram; Robert son of Reginald; and others.
